allowedUse: feed trend triage and life-agent opportunity discovery
create public-safe briefing candidates with source links
compare internal work against external public signals
blockedUse: treating public feed titles as verified facts without source review
copying article bodies or copyrighted text into runtime artifacts
financial, legal, medical, or investment decisions without human review
external posting, trading, purchasing, or destructive actions
